firmware.title: Razer Phone Software Update available.
firmware.description:
The Android Pie 9.0 update is here! Highlights include:

• Adaptive Battery.
• Gesture Navigation.
• Notification Management.
• Digital Wellbeing support.
• Camera now supports 720p/1080p/4K at 60FPS video recording.
• Bug fixes and performance improvements.
• Security updates through Feb. 5, 2019
